http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventDate.name: Event Date
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventDate.description: The date-time or interval during which a dwc:Event occurred. For occurrences, this is the date-time when the dwc:Event was recorded. Not suitable for a time in a geological context.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/basisOfReco.name: Basis Of Record
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/basisOfReco.description: The specific nature of the data record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.name: Scientific Name
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.description: The full scientific name, with authorship and date information if known. When forming part of a dwc:Identification, this should be the name in lowest level taxonomic rank that can be determined. This term should not contain identification qualifications, which should instead be supplied in the dwc:identificationQualifier term.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceI.name: Occurrence ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceI.description: An identifier for the dwc:Occurrence (as opposed to a particular digital record of the dwc:Occurrence). In the absence of a persistent global unique identifier, construct one from a combination of identifiers in the record that will most closely make the dwc:occurrenceID globally unique.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/country.name: Country
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/country.description: The name of the country or major administrative unit in which the dcterms:Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventTime.name: Event Time
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventTime.description: The time or interval during which a dwc:Event occurred.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dataGeneral.name: Data Generalizations
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dataGeneral.description: Actions taken to make the shared data less specific or complete than in its original form. Suggests that alternative data of higher quality may be available on request.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/information.name: Information Withheld
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/information.description: Additional information that exists, but that has not been shared in the given record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/geodeticDat.name: Geodetic Datum
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/geodeticDat.description: The ellipsoid, geodetic datum, or spatial reference system (SRS) upon which the geographic coordinates given in dwc:decimalLatitude and dwc:decimalLongitude are based.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateU.name: Coordinate Uncertainty In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateU.description: The horizontal distance (in meters) from the given dwc:decimalLatitude and dwc:decimalLongitude describing the smallest circle containing the whole of the dcterms:Location. Leave the value empty if the uncertainty is unknown, cannot be estimated, or is not applicable (because there are no coordinates). Zero is not a valid value for this term.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/countryCode.name: Country Code
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/countryCode.description: The standard code for the country in which the dcterms:Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLati.name: Decimal Latitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLati.description: The geographic latitude (in decimal degrees, using the spatial reference system given in dwc:geodeticDatum) of the geographic center of a dcterms:Location. Positive values are north of the Equator, negative values are south of it. Legal values lie between -90 and 90, inclusive.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLong.name: Decimal Longitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLong.description: The geographic longitude (in decimal degrees, using the spatial reference system given in dwc:geodeticDatum) of the geographic center of a dcterms:Location. Positive values are east of the Greenwich Meridian, negative values are west of it. Legal values lie between -180 and 180, inclusive.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/individualC.name: Individual Count
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/individualC.description: The number of individuals present at the time of the dwc:Occurrence.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismQua.name: Organism Quantity
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismQua.description: A number or enumeration value for the quantity of dwc:Organisms.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonRank.name: Taxon Rank
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonRank.description: The taxonomic rank of the most specific name in the dwc:scientificName.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismQua.name: Organism Quantity Type
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismQua.description: The type of quantification system used for the quantity of dwc:Organisms.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestEon.name: Earliest Eon Or Lowest Eonothem
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestEon.description: The full name of the earliest possible geochronologic eon or lowest chrono-stratigraphic eonothem or the informal name ("Precambrian") attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestEpo.name: Earliest Epoch Or Lowest Series
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestEpo.description: The full name of the earliest possible geochronologic epoch or lowest chronostratigraphic series attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestAge.name: Earliest Age Or Lowest Stage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestAge.description: The full name of the earliest possible geochronologic age or lowest chronostratigraphic stage attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/bed.name: Bed
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/bed.description: The full name of the lithostratigraphic bed from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/fromLithostra.name: From Lithostratigraphic Unit
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/fromLithostra.description: Use to link a dwc:GeologicalContext instance to an IRI-identified lithostratigraphic unit at the lowest possible level in a hierarchy.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentEvent.name: Parent Event ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentEvent.description: An identifier for the broader dwc:Event that groups this and potentially other dwc:Events.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordNumbe.name: Record Number
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordNumbe.description: An identifier given to the dwc:Occurrence at the time it was recorded. Often serves as a link between field notes and a dwc:Occurrence record, such as a specimen collector's number.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/waterBody.name: Water Body
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/waterBody.description: The name of the water body in which the dcterms:Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/catalogNumb.name: Catalog Number
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/catalogNumb.description: An identifier (preferably unique) for the record within the data set or collection.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordedBy.name: Recorded By
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordedBy.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of names of people, groups, or organizations responsible for recording the original dwc:Occurrence. The primary collector or observer, especially one who applies a personal identifier (dwc:recordNumber), should be listed first.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventID.name: Event ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventID.description: An identifier for the set of information associated with a dwc:Event (something that occurs at a place and time). May be a global unique identifier or an identifier specific to the data set.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: Georeferenced By
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of names of people, groups, or organizations who determined the georeference (spatial representation) for the dcterms:Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDept.name: Maximum Depth In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDept.description: The greater depth of a range of depth below the local surface, in meters.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/island.name: Island
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/island.description: The name of the island on or near which the dcterms:Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/islandGroup.name: Island Group
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/islandGroup.description: The name of the island group in which the dcterms:Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDept.name: Minimum Depth In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDept.description: The lesser depth of a range of depth below the local surface, in meters.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: Georeferenced Date
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: The date on which the dcterms:Location was georeferenced.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: Georeference Remarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: Notes or comments about the spatial description determination, explaining assumptions made in addition or opposition to the those formalized in the method referred to in dwc:georeferenceProtocol.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumElev.name: Maximum Elevation In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumElev.description: The upper limit of the range of elevation (altitude, usually above sea level), in meters.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumElev.name: Minimum Elevation In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumElev.description: The lower limit of the range of elevation (altitude, usually above sea level), in meters.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: Georeference Protocol
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: A description or reference to the methods used to determine the spatial footprint, coordinates, and uncertainties.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimEle.name: Verbatim Elevation
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimEle.description: The original description of the elevation (altitude, usually above sea level) of the Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLat.name: Verbatim Latitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLat.description: The verbatim original latitude of the dcterms:Location. The coordinate ellipsoid, geodeticDatum, or full Spatial Reference System (SRS) for these coordinates should be stored in dwc:verbatimSRS and the coordinate system should be stored in dwc:verbatimCoordinateSystem.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLoc.name: Verbatim Locality
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLoc.description: The original textual description of the place.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLon.name: Verbatim Longitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLon.description: The verbatim original longitude of the dcterms:Location. The coordinate ellipsoid, geodeticDatum, or full Spatial Reference System (SRS) for these coordinates should be stored in dwc:verbatimSRS and the coordinate system should be stored in dwc:verbatimCoordinateSystem.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/samplingPro.name: Sampling Protocol
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/samplingPro.description: The names of, references to, or descriptions of the methods or protocols used during a dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/continent.name: Continent
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/continent.description: The name of the continent in which the dcterms:Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/county.name: Second Order Division
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/county.description: The full, unabbreviated name of the next smaller administrative region than stateProvince (county, shire, department, etc.) in which the dcterms:Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/day.name: Day
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/day.description: The integer day of the month on which the dwc:Event occurred.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/month.name: Month
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/month.description: The integer month in which the dwc:Event occurred.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/year.name: Year
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/year.description: The four-digit year in which the dwc:Event occurred, according to the Common Era Calendar.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimEve.name: Verbatim EventDate
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimEve.description: The verbatim original representation of the date and time information for a dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locality.name: Locality
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locality.description: The specific description of the place.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/cultivarEpi.name: Cultivar Epithet
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/cultivarEpi.description: Part of the name of a cultivar, cultivar group or grex that follows the dwc:scientificName.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationRem.name: Location Remarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationRem.description: Comments or notes about the dcterms:Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/collectionC.name: Collection Code
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/collectionC.description: The name, acronym, coden, or initialism identifying the collection or data set from which the record was derived.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventRemark.name: Event Remarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/eventRemark.description: Comments or notes about the dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/institution.name: Institution Code
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/institution.description: The name (or acronym) in use by the institution having custody of the object(s) or information referred to in the record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedR.name: Associated References
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedR.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of identifiers (publication, bibliographic reference, global unique identifier, URI) of literature associated with the dwc:Occurrence.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/fieldNumber.name: Field Number
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/fieldNumber.description: An identifier given to the dwc:Event in the field. Often serves as a link between field notes and the dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dateIdentif.name: Date Identified
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dateIdentif.description: The date on which the subject was determined as representing the dwc:Taxon.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identifiedB.name: Identified By ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identifiedB.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of the globally unique identifier for the person, people, groups, or organizations responsible for assigning the dwc:Taxon to the subject.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/license.name: License
http://purl.org/dc/terms/license.description: A legal document giving official permission to do something with the resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedM.name: Associated Media
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedM.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of identifiers (publication, global unique identifier, URI) of media associated with the dwc:Occurrence.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identifiedB.name: Identified By
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identifiedB.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of names of people, groups, or organizations who assigned the dwc:Taxon to the subject.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/stateProvin.name: First Order Division
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/stateProvin.description: The name of the next smaller administrative region than country (state, province, canton, department, region, etc.) in which the dcterms:Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/kingdom.name: Kingdom
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/kingdom.description: The full scientific name of the kingdom in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/class.name: Class
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/class.description: The full scientific name of the class in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/family.name: Family
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/family.description: The full scientific name of the family in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/genus.name: Genus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/genus.description: The full scientific name of the genus in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/order.name: Order
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/order.description: The full scientific name of the order in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/phylum.name: Phylum
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/phylum.description: The full scientific name of the phylum or division in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subfamily.name: Subfamily
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subfamily.description: The full scientific name of the subfamily in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subgenus.name: Subgenus
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subgenus.description: The full scientific name of the subgenus in which the dwc:Taxon is classified. Values should include the genus to avoid homonym confusion.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/specificEpi.name: Specific Epithet
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/specificEpi.description: The name of the first or species epithet of the dwc:scientificName.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/infrageneri.name: Infrageneric Epithet
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/infrageneri.description: The infrageneric part of a binomial name at ranks above species but below genus.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/infraspecif.name: Infraspecific Epithet
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/infraspecif.description: The name of the lowest or terminal infraspecific epithet of the dwc:scientificName, excluding any rank designation.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subtribe.name: Subtribe
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/subtribe.description: The full scientific name of the subtribe in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/superfamily.name: Superfamily
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/superfamily.description: The full scientific name of the superfamily in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/tribe.name: Tribe
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/tribe.description: The full scientific name of the tribe in which the dwc:Taxon is classified.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonRemark.name: Taxon Remarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonRemark.description: Comments or notes about the taxon or name.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.name: Scientific Name Authorship
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.description: The authorship information for the dwc:scientificName formatted according to the conventions of the applicable dwc:nomenclaturalCode.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.name: Identification Remarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.description: Comments or notes about the dwc:Identification.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/typeStatus.name: Type Status
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/typeStatus.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of nomenclatural types (type status, typified scientific name, publication) applied to the subject.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/previousIde.name: Previous Identifications
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/previousIde.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of previous assignments of names to the dwc:Organism.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/otherCatalo.name: Other Catalog Numbers
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/otherCatalo.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of previous or alternate fully qualified catalog numbers or other human-used identifiers for the same dwc:Occurrence, whether in the current or any other data set or collection.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/GeologicalC.name: Geological Context
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/GeologicalC.description: Geological information, such as stratigraphy, that qualifies a region or place.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationID.name: Location ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationID.description: An identifier for the set of dcterms:Location information. May be a global unique identifier or an identifier specific to the data set.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/preparation.name: Preparations
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/preparation.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of preparations and preservation methods for a dwc:MaterialEntity.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/Taxon.name: Taxon
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/Taxon.description: A group of organisms (sensu http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OBI_0100026) considered by taxonomists to form a homogeneous unit.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonID.name: Taxon ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonID.description: An identifier for the set of dwc:Taxon information. May be a global unique identifier or an identifier specific to the data set.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceR.name: Occurrence Remarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceR.description: Comments or notes about the dwc:Occurrence.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedT.name: Associated Taxa
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedT.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of identifiers or names of dwc:Taxon records and the associations of this dwc:Occurrence to each of them.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/datasetName.name: Dataset Name
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/datasetName.description: The name identifying the data set from which the record was derived.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lifeStage.name: Life Stage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lifeStage.description: The age class or life stage of the dwc:Organism(s) at the time the dwc:Occurrence was recorded.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordedByI.name: Recorded By ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/recordedByI.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of the globally unique identifier for the person, people, groups, or organizations responsible for recording the original dwc:Occurrence.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sex.name: Sex
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sex.description: The sex of the biological individual(s) represented in the dwc:Occurrence.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.name: Verbatim Coordinates
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.description: The verbatim original spatial coordinates of the dcterms:Location. The coordinate ellipsoid, geodeticDatum, or full Spatial Reference System (SRS) for these coordinates should be stored in dwc:verbatimSRS and the coordinate system should be stored in dwc:verbatimCoordinateSystem.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimDep.name: Verbatim Depth
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimDep.description: The original description of the depth below the local surface.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimIde.name: Verbatim Identification
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimIde.description: A string representing the taxonomic identification as it appeared in the original record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimSRS.name: Verbatim SRS
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimSRS.description: The ellipsoid, geodetic datum, or spatial reference system (SRS) upon which coordinates given in dwc:verbatimLatitude and dwc:verbatimLongitude, or dwc:verbatimCoordinates are based.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/acceptedNam.name: Accepted Name Usage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/acceptedNam.description: The full name, with authorship and date information if known, of the currently valid (zoological) or accepted (botanical) dwc:Taxon.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/acceptedNam.name: Accepted Name Usage ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/acceptedNam.description: An identifier for the name usage (documented meaning of the name according to a source) of the currently valid (zoological) or accepted (botanical) taxon.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/habitat.name: Habitat
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/habitat.description: A category or description of the habitat in which the dwc:Event occurred.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedO.name: Associated Occurrences
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedO.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of identifiers of other dwc:Occurrence records and their associations to this dwc:Occurrence.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedO.name: Associated Organisms
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedO.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of identifiers of other dwc:Organisms and the associations of this dwc:Organism to each of them.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedS.name: Associated Sequences
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/associatedS.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of identifiers (publication, global unique identifier, URI) of genetic sequence information associated with the dwc:MaterialEntity.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/behavior.name: Behavior
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/behavior.description: The behavior shown by the subject at the time the dwc:Occurrence was recorded.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/accessRights.name: Access Rights
http://purl.org/dc/terms/accessRights.description: Information about who can access the resource or an indication of its security status.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/caste.name: Caste
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/caste.description: Categorisation of individuals for eusocial species (including some mammals and arthropods).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/collectionI.name: Collection ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/collectionI.description: An identifier for the collection or dataset from which the record was derived.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateP.name: Coordinate Precision
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateP.description: A decimal representation of the precision of the coordinates given in the dwc:decimalLatitude and dwc:decimalLongitude.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/datasetID.name: Dataset ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/datasetID.description: An identifier for the set of data. May be a global unique identifier or an identifier specific to a collection or institution.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/degreeOfEst.name: Degree of Establishment
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/degreeOfEst.description: The degree to which a dwc:Organism survives, reproduces, and expands its range at the given place and time.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/disposition.name: Disposition
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/disposition.description: The current state of a dwc:MaterialEntity with respect to a collection.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dynamicProp.name: Dynamic Properties
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/dynamicProp.description: A list of additional measurements, facts, characteristics, or assertions about the record. Meant to provide a mechanism for structured content.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/bibliographicCi.name: Bibliographic Citation
http://purl.org/dc/terms/bibliographicCi.description: A bibliographic reference for the resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/fieldNotes.name: Field Notes
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/fieldNotes.description: One of a) an indicator of the existence of, b) a reference to (publication, URI), or c) the text of notes taken in the field about the dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintSp.name: Footprint Spatial Fit
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintSp.description: The ratio of the area of the dwc:footprintWKT to the area of the true (original, or most specific) spatial representation of the dcterms:Location. Legal values are 0, greater than or equal to 1, or undefined. A value of 1 is an exact match or 100% overlap. A value of 0 should be used if the given dwc:footprintWKT does not completely contain the original representation. The dwc:footprintSpatialFit is undefined (and should be left empty) if the original representation is any geometry without area (e.g., a point or polyline) and without uncertainty and the given georeference is not that same geometry (without uncertainty). If both the original and the given georeference are the same point, the dwc:footprintSpatialFit is 1.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintSR.name: Footprint SRS
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintSR.description: The ellipsoid, geodetic datum, or spatial reference system (SRS) upon which the geometry given in dwc:footprintWKT is based.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintWK.name: Footprint WKT
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintWK.description: A Well-Known Text (WKT) representation of the shape (footprint, geometry) that defines the dcterms:Location. A dcterms:Location may have both a point-radius representation (see dwc:decimalLatitude) and a footprint representation, and they may differ from each other.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/geologicalC.name: Geological Context ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/geologicalC.description: An identifier for the set of information associated with a dwc:GeologicalContext (the location within a geological context, such as stratigraphy). May be a global unique identifier or an identifier specific to the data set.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: Georeference Sources
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of maps, gazetteers, or other resources used to georeference the dcterms:Location, described specifically enough to allow anyone in the future to use the same resources.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherGeogr.name: Higher Geography
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherGeogr.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of geographic names less specific than the information captured in the dwc:locality term.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherGeogr.name: Higher Geography ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherGeogr.description: An identifier for the geographic region within which the dcterms:Location occurred.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationAcc.name: Location According To
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationAcc.description: Information about the source of this dcterms:Location information. Could be a publication (gazetteer), institution, or team of individuals.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDist.name: Maximum Distance Above Surface In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDist.description: The greater distance in a range of distance from a reference surface in the vertical direction, in meters. Use positive values for locations above the surface, negative values for locations below. If depth measures are given, the reference surface is the location given by the depth, otherwise the reference surface is the location given by the elevation.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDist.name: Minimum Distance Above Surface In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDist.description: The lesser distance in a range of distance from a reference surface in the vertical direction, in meters. Use positive values for locations above the surface, negative values for locations below. If depth measures are given, the reference surface is the location given by the depth, otherwise the reference surface is the location given by the elevation.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.name: Date Modified
http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.description: The most recent date-time on which the resource was changed.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/municipalit.name: Third Order Division
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/municipalit.description: The full, unabbreviated name of the next smaller administrative region than county (city, municipality, etc.) in which the dcterms:Location occurs. Do not use this term for a nearby named place that does not contain the actual dcterms:Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nameAccordi.name: Name According To ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nameAccordi.description: An identifier for the source in which the specific taxon concept circumscription is defined or implied. See dwc:nameAccordingTo.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismSco.name: Organism Scope
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismSco.description: A description of the kind of dwc:Organism instance. Can be used to indicate whether the dwc:Organism instance represents a discrete organism or if it represents a particular type of aggregation.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/originalNam.name: Original Name Usage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/originalNam.description: The taxon name, with authorship and date information if known, as it originally appeared when first established under the rules of the associated dwc:nomenclaturalCode. The basionym (botany) or basonym (bacteriology) of the dwc:scientificName or the senior/earlier homonym for replaced names.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/originalNam.name: Original Name Usage ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/originalNam.description: An identifier for the name usage (documented meaning of the name according to a source) in which the terminal element of the dwc:scientificName was originally established under the rules of the associated dwc:nomenclaturalCode.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/ownerInstit.name: Owner Institution Code
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/ownerInstit.description: The name (or acronym) in use by the institution having ownership of the object(s) or information referred to in the record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentMeasu.name: Parent Measurement ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentMeasu.description: An identifier for a broader dwc:MeasurementOrFact that groups this and potentially other dwc:MeasurementOrFacts.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentNameU.name: Parent Name Usage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentNameU.description: The full name, with authorship and date information if known, of the direct, most proximate higher-rank parent dwc:Taxon (in a classification) of the most specific element of the dwc:scientificName.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentNameU.name: Parent Name Usage ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/parentNameU.description: An identifier for the name usage (documented meaning of the name according to a source) of the direct, most proximate higher-rank parent taxon (in a classification) of the most specific element of the dwc:scientificName.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/pathway.name: Pathway
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/pathway.description: The process by which a dwc:Organism came to be in a given place at a given time.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/pointRadius.name: Point Radius Spatial Fit
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/pointRadius.description: The ratio of the area of the point-radius (dwc:decimalLatitude, dwc:decimalLongitude, dwc:coordinateUncertaintyInMeters) to the area of the true (original, or most specific) spatial representation of the dcterms:Location. Legal values are 0, greater than or equal to 1, or undefined. A value of 1 is an exact match or 100% overlap. A value of 0 should be used if the given point-radius does not completely contain the original representation. The dwc:pointRadiusSpatialFit is undefined (and should be left empty) if the original representation is any geometry without area (e.g., a point or polyline) and without uncertainty and the given georeference is not that same geometry (without uncertainty). If both the original and the given georeference are the same point, the dwc:pointRadiusSpatialFit is 1.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/PreservedSp.name: Preserved Specimen
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/PreservedSp.description: A specimen that has been preserved.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/Location.name: Location
http://purl.org/dc/terms/Location.description: A spatial region or named place.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relatedReso.name: Related Resource ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relatedReso.description: An identifier for a related resource (the object, rather than the subject of the relationship).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.name: Relationship According To
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.description: The source (person, organization, publication, reference) establishing the relationship between the two resources.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.name: Relationship Established Date
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.description: The date-time on which the relationship between the two resources was established.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.name: Relationship Of Resource
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.description: The relationship of the subject (identified by dwc:resourceID) to the object (identified by dwc:relatedResourceID).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.name: Relationship Of Resource ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.description: An identifier for the relationship type (predicate) that connects the subject identified by dwc:resourceID to its object identified by dwc:relatedResourceID.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.name: Relationship Remarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/relationshi.description: Comments or notes about the relationship between the two resources.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/reproductiv.name: Reproductive Condition
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/reproductiv.description: The reproductive condition of the biological individual(s) represented in the dwc:Occurrence.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/resourceID.name: Resource ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/resourceID.description: An identifier for the resource that is the subject of the relationship.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/ResourceRel.name: Resource Relationship
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/ResourceRel.description: A relationship of one rdfs:Resource (http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Resource) to another.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/resourceRel.name: Resource Relationship ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/resourceRel.description: An identifier for an instance of relationship between one resource (the subject) and another (dwc:relatedResource, the object).

http://purl.org/dc/terms/references.name: References
http://purl.org/dc/terms/references.description: A related resource that is referenced, cited, or otherwise pointed to by the described resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sampleSizeU.name: Sample Size Unit
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sampleSizeU.description: The unit of measurement of the size (time duration, length, area, or volume) of a sample in a sampling dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sampleSizeV.name: Sample Size Value
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/sampleSizeV.description: A numeric value for a measurement of the size (time duration, length, area, or volume) of a sample in a sampling dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/samplingEff.name: Sampling Effort
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/samplingEff.description: The amount of effort expended during a dwc:Event.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.name: Scientific Name ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/scientificN.description: An identifier for the nomenclatural (not taxonomic) details of a scientific name.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/startDayOfY.name: Start Day Of Year
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/startDayOfY.description: The earliest integer day of the year on which the dwc:Event occurred (1 for January 1, 365 for December 31, except in a leap year, in which case it is 366).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonConcep.name: Taxon Concept ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonConcep.description: An identifier for the taxonomic concept to which the record refers - not for the nomenclatural details of a dwc:Taxon.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonomicSt.name: Taxonomic Status
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/taxonomicSt.description: The status of the use of the dwc:scientificName as a label for a taxon. Requires taxonomic opinion to define the scope of a dwc:Taxon. Rules of priority then are used to define the taxonomic status of the nomenclature contained in that scope, combined with the experts opinion. It must be linked to a specific taxonomic reference that defines the concept.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/toTaxon.name: To Taxon
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/toTaxon.description: Use to link a dwc:Identification instance subject to a taxonomic entity such as a taxon, taxon concept, or taxon name use.

http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/type.name: Type
http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/type.description: The nature or genre of the resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.name: Verbatim Coordinate System
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.description: The coordinate format for the dwc:verbatimLatitude and dwc:verbatimLongitude or the dwc:verbatimCoordinates of the dcterms:Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLab.name: Verbatim Label
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLab.description: The content of this term should include no embellishments, prefixes, headers or other additions made to the text. Abbreviations must not be expanded and supposed misspellings must not be corrected. Lines or breakpoints between blocks of text that could be verified by seeing the original labels or images of them may be used. Examples of material entities include preserved specimens, fossil specimens, and material samples. Best practice is to use UTF-8 for all characters. Best practice is to add comment “verbatimLabel derived from human transcription” in dwc:occurrenceRemarks.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimTax.name: Verbatim Taxon Rank
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimTax.description: The taxonomic rank of the most specific name in the dwc:scientificName as it appears in the original record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verticalDat.name: Vertical Datum
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verticalDat.description: The vertical datum used as the reference upon which the values in the elevation terms are based.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/vitality.name: Vitality
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/vitality.description: An indication of whether a dwc:Organism was alive or dead at the time of collection or observation.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestEra.name: Earliest Era Or Lowest Erathem
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestEra.description: The full name of the earliest possible geochronologic era or lowest chronostratigraphic erathem attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/earliestGeoch.name: Earliest Geochronological Era
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/earliestGeoch.description: Use to link a dwc:GeologicalContext instance to chronostratigraphic time periods at the lowest possible level in a standardized hierarchy. Use this property to point to the earliest possible geological time period from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/rightsHolder.name: Rights Holder
http://purl.org/dc/terms/rightsHolder.description: A person or organization owning or managing rights over the resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestPer.name: Earliest Period Or Lowest System
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/earliestPer.description: The full name of the earliest possible geochronologic period or lowest chronostratigraphic system attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/endDayOfYea.name: End Day Of Year
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/endDayOfYea.description: The latest integer day of the year on which the dwc:Event occurred (1 for January 1, 365 for December 31, except in a leap year, in which case it is 366).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/establishme.name: Establishment Means
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/establishme.description: Statement about whether a dwc:Organism has been introduced to a given place and time through the direct or indirect activity of modern humans.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/Event.name: Event
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/Event.description: An action that occurs at some location during some time.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/formation.name: Formation
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/formation.description: The full name of the lithostratigraphic formation from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/FossilSpeci.name: Fossil Specimen
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/FossilSpeci.description: A preserved specimen that is a fossil.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/genericName.name: Generic Name
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/genericName.description: The genus part of the dwc:scientificName without authorship.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: Georeference Verification Status
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: A categorical description of the extent to which the georeference has been verified to represent the best possible spatial description for the dcterms:Location of the dwc:Occurrence.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/group.name: Group
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/group.description: The full name of the lithostratigraphic group from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherClass.name: Higher Classification
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherClass.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of taxa names terminating at the rank immediately superior to the referenced dwc:Taxon.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/highestBios.name: Highest Biostratigraphic Zone
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/highestBios.description: The full name of the highest possible geological biostratigraphic zone of the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/HumanObserv.name: Human Observation
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/HumanObserv.description: An output of a human observation process.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/Identificat.name: Identification
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/Identificat.description: A taxonomic determination (e.g., the assignment to a dwc:Taxon).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.name: Identification ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.description: An identifier for the dwc:Identification (the body of information associated with the assignment of a scientific name). May be a global unique identifier or an identifier specific to the data set.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.name: Identification Qualifier
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.description: A brief phrase or a standard term ("cf.", "aff.") to express the determiner's doubts about the dwc:Identification.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.name: Identification References
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of references (publication, global unique identifier, URI) used in the dwc:Identification.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.name: Identification Verification Status
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/identificat.description: A categorical indicator of the extent to which the taxonomic identification has been verified to be correct.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/inCollection.name: In Collection
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/inCollection.description: Use to link any subject resource that is part of a collection to the collection containing the resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/inDataset.name: In Dataset
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/inDataset.description: Use to link a subject dataset record to the dataset which contains it.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/inDescribedPl.name: In Described Place
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/inDescribedPl.description: Use to link a dcterms:Location instance subject to the lowest level standardized hierarchically-described resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/institution.name: Institution ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/institution.description: An identifier for the institution having custody of the object(s) or information referred to in the record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestAgeOr.name: Latest Age Or Highest Stage
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestAgeOr.description: The full name of the latest possible geochronologic age or highest chronostratigraphic stage attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestEonOr.name: Llatest Eon Or Highest Eonothem
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestEonOr.description: The full name of the latest possible geochronologic eon or highest chrono-stratigraphic eonothem or the informal name ("Precambrian") attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestEpoch.name: Latest Epoch Or Highest Series
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestEpoch.description: The full name of the latest possible geochronologic epoch or highest chronostratigraphic series attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestEraOr.name: Latest Era Or Highest Erathem
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestEraOr.description: The full name of the latest possible geochronologic era or highest chronostratigraphic erathem attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/latestGeochro.name: Latest Geochronological Era
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/iri/latestGeochro.description: Use to link a dwc:GeologicalContext instance to chronostratigraphic time periods at the lowest possible level in a standardized hierarchy. Use this property to point to the latest possible geological time period from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestPerio.name: Latest Period Or Highest System
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/latestPerio.description: The full name of the latest possible geochronologic period or highest chronostratigraphic system attributable to the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lithostrati.name: Lithostratigraphic Terms
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lithostrati.description: The combination of all litho-stratigraphic names for the rock from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lowestBiost.name: Lowest Biostratigraphic Zone
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/lowestBiost.description: The full name of the lowest possible geological biostratigraphic zone of the stratigraphic horizon from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/MachineObse.name: Machine Observation
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/MachineObse.description: An output of a machine observation process.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/MaterialCit.name: Material Citation
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/MaterialCit.description: A reference to or citation of one, a part of, or multiple specimens in scholarly publications.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/MaterialEnt.name: Material Entity
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/MaterialEnt.description: An entity that can be identified, exists for some period of time, and consists in whole or in part of physical matter while it exists.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialEnt.name: Material Entity ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialEnt.description: An identifier for a particular instance of a dwc:MaterialEntity.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialEnt.name: Material Entity Remarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialEnt.description: Comments or notes about the dwc:MaterialEntity instance.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/MaterialSam.name: Material Sample
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/MaterialSam.description: A material entity that represents an entity of interest in whole or in part.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialSam.name: Material Sample ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/materialSam.description: An identifier for the dwc:MaterialSample (as opposed to a particular digital record of the dwc:MaterialSample). In the absence of a persistent global unique identifier, construct one from a combination of identifiers in the record that will most closely make the dwc:materialSampleID globally unique.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: Measurement Accuracy
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: The description of the potential error associated with the dwc:measurementValue.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: Measurement Determined By
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of names of people, groups, or organizations who determined the value of the dwc:MeasurementOrFact.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: Measurement Determined Date
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: The date on which the dwc:MeasurementOrFact was made.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: Measurement ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: An identifier for the dwc:MeasurementOrFact (information pertaining to measurements, facts, characteristics, or assertions). May be a global unique identifier or an identifier specific to the data set.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: Measurement Method
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: A description of or reference to (publication, URI) the method or protocol used to determine the measurement, fact, characteristic, or assertion.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/Measurement.name: Measurement Or Fact
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/Measurement.description: A measurement of or fact about an rdfs:Resource (http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Resource).

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: Measurement Remarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: Comments or notes accompanying the dwc:MeasurementOrFact.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: Measurement Type
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: The nature of the measurement, fact, characteristic, or assertion.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: Measurement Unit
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: The units associated with the dwc:measurementValue.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.name: Measurement Value
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/measurement.description: The value of the measurement, fact, characteristic, or assertion.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/member.name: Member
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/member.description: The full name of the lithostratigraphic member from which the dwc:MaterialEntity was collected.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nameAccordi.name: Name According To
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nameAccordi.description: The reference to the source in which the specific taxon concept circumscription is defined or implied - traditionally signified by the Latin "sensu" or "sec." (from secundum, meaning "according to"). For taxa that result from identifications, a reference to the keys, monographs, experts and other sources should be given.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/namePublish.name: Name Published In
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/namePublish.description: A reference for the publication in which the dwc:scientificName was originally established under the rules of the associated dwc:nomenclaturalCode.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/namePublish.name: Name Published In ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/namePublish.description: An identifier for the publication in which the dwc:scientificName was originally established under the rules of the associated dwc:nomenclaturalCode.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/namePublish.name: Name Published In Year
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/namePublish.description: The four-digit year in which the dwc:scientificName was published.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nomenclatur.name: Nomenclatural Code
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nomenclatur.description: The nomenclatural code (or codes in the case of an ambiregnal name) under which the dwc:scientificName is constructed.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nomenclatur.name: Nomenclatural Status
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/nomenclatur.description: The status related to the original publication of the name and its conformance to the relevant rules of nomenclature. It is based essentially on an algorithm according to the business rules of the code. It requires no taxonomic opinion.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/Occurrence.name: Occurrence
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/Occurrence.description: An existence of a dwc:Organism at a particular place at a particular time.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceS.name: Occurrence Status
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/occurrenceS.description: A statement about the presence or absence of a dwc:Taxon at a dcterms:Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/Organism.name: Organism
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/Organism.description: A particular organism or defined group of organisms considered to be taxonomically homogeneous.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismID.name: Organism ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismID.description: An identifier for the dwc:Organism instance (as opposed to a particular digital record of the dwc:Organism). May be a globally unique identifier or an identifier specific to the data set.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismNam.name: Organism Name
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismNam.description: A textual name or label assigned to a dwc:Organism instance.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismRem.name: Organism Remarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/organismRem.description: Comments or notes about the dwc:Organism instance.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/available.name: Date Available
http://purl.org/dc/terms/available.description: Date (often a range) that the resource became or will become available.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/commenter.name: Commenter
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/commenter.description: A URI denoting a person who created a comment.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/commenterLit.name: Commenter
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/commenterLit.description: The name of a person who created a comment, or the literal "anonymous" (= anonymously commented).

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/comments.name: Comments
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/comments.description: Any comment provided on the media resource, as free-form text.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/hasServiceAc.name: Service Access Point
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/hasServiceAc.description: In a chosen serialization (RDF, XML Schema, etc.) the potentially multiple service access points (e.g., for different resolutions of an image) might be provided in a referenced or in a nested object. This property identifies one such access point. That is, each of potentially multiple values of hasServiceAccessPoint identifies a set of representation-dependent metadata using the properties defined under the Service Access Point Vocabulary section of the Audiovisual Core Term List document.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/identifier.name: Identifier
http://purl.org/dc/terms/identifier.description: An unambiguous reference to the resource within a given context.

http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/MetadataDate.name: Metadata Date
http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/MetadataDate.description: The date and time that any metadata for this resource was last changed. It should be the same as or more recent than xmp:ModifyDate.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/metadataLang.name: Metadata Language
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/metadataLang.description: The URI of the language of description and other metadata (but not necessarily of the image itself) , from the ISO639-2 list of URIs for ISO 3-letter language codes, http://id.loc.gov/vocabulary/iso639-2.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/metadataLang.name: Metadata Language
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/metadataLang.description: Language of description and other metadata (but not necessarily of the image itself) represented as an ISO639-2 three letter language code.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.name: Modified
http://purl.org/dc/terms/modified.description: Date on which the resource was changed.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/providerMana.name: Provider-managed ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/providerMana.description: A free-form identifier (a simple number, an alphanumeric code, a URL, etc.) for the resource that is unique and meaningful primarily for the data provider.

http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/Rating.name: Rating
http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/Rating.description: A user-assigned rating for this file. The value shall be -1 or in the range [0..5], where -1 indicates "rejected" and 0 indicates "unrated". If xmp:Rating is not present, a value of 0 should be assumed.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/reviewerComm.name: Reviewer Comments
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/reviewerComm.description: Any comment provided by a reviewer with expertise in the subject, as free-form text.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/reviewerLite.name: Reviewer
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/reviewerLite.description: String providing the name of a reviewer.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/subtype.name: Subtype (IRI)
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/subtype.description: A class, represented by an IRI, that provides for more specialization of the media item type than dcterms:type.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/subtypeLiter.name: Subtype (literal)
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/subtypeLiter.description: A class, represented by a controlled value string, that provides for more specialization of the media item type than dc:type.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/title.name: Title
http://purl.org/dc/terms/title.description: A name given to the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/type.name: Type
http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/type.description: The nature or genre of the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/type.name: Type
http://purl.org/dc/terms/type.description: The nature or genre of the resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/attributionL.name: Attribution Link URL
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/attributionL.description: The URL where information about ownership, attribution, etc. of the resource may be found.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/attributionL.name: Attribution URL
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/attributionL.description: The URL of the icon or logo image to appear in source attribution.

http://ns.adobe.com/photoshop/1.0/Credit.name: Credit
http://ns.adobe.com/photoshop/1.0/Credit.description: The credit to person(s) and/or organisation(s) required by the supplier of the item to be used when published. This is a free-text field.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/fundingAttri.name: Funding
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/fundingAttri.description: Text description of organizations or individuals who funded the creation of the resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/licenseLogoU.name: License Logo URL
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/licenseLogoU.description: A URL providing access to a logo that symbolizes the License.

http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/rights/Owner.name: Copyright Owner
http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/rights/Owner.description: A list of legal owners of the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/rights.name: Copyright Statement
http://purl.org/dc/terms/rights.description: Information about rights held in and over the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/rights.name: Copyright Statement
http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/rights.description: Information about rights held in and over the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/source.name: Published Source
http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/source.description: A related resource from which the described resource is derived.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/source.name: Published Source
http://purl.org/dc/terms/source.description: A related resource from which the described resource is derived.

http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/rights/Usage.name: License Terms
http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/rights/Usage.description: A collection of text instructions on how a resource can be legally used, given in a variety of languages.

http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/rights/WebSt.name: License URL
http://ns.adobe.com/xap/1.0/rights/WebSt.description: A Web URL for a statement of the ownership and usage rights for this resource.

http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/creator.name: Creator
http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/creator.description: An entity primarily responsible for making the resource.

http://purl.org/dc/terms/creator.name: Creator
http://purl.org/dc/terms/creator.description: An entity primarily responsible for making the resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/metadataCrea.name: Metadata Creator
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/metadataCrea.description: A URI representing a person or organization originally creating the resource metadata record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/metadataCrea.name: Metadata Creator
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/metadataCrea.description: Name of the person or organization originally creating the resource metadata record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/metadataProv.name: Metadata Provider
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/metadataProv.description: URI of person or organization originally responsible for providing the resource metadata record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/metadataProv.name: Metadata Provider
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/metadataProv.description: Name of the person or organization originally responsible for providing the resource metadata record.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/provider.name: Provider
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/provider.description: URI for person or organization responsible for presenting the media resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/providerLite.name: Provider
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/providerLite.description: Name of the person or organization responsible for presenting the media resource.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/caption.name: Caption
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/caption.description: As alternative or in addition to description, a caption is free-form text to be displayed together with (rather than instead of) a resource that is suitable for captions (especially images).

http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.name: Subject Category
http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.description: A term to describe the content of the image by a value from a Controlled Vocabulary.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/freqHigh.name: Upper frequency bound
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/freqHigh.description: The highest frequency of the phenomena reflected in the multimedia item or Region of Interest.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/freqLow.name: Lower frequency bound
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/freqLow.description: The lowest frequency of the phenomena reflected in the multimedia item or Region of Interest.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/physicalSett.name: Physical Setting
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/physicalSett.description: The setting of the content represented in media such as images, sounds, and movies if the provider deems them relevant.

http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/subjectCateg.name: Subject Category Vocabulary
http://rs.tdwg.org/ac/terms/subjectCateg.description: Any vocabulary or formal classification from which terms in the Subject Category have been drawn.

http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.name: City or Place Name
http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.description: Name of the city of a location. This element is at the fourth level of a top-down geographical hierarchy.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/continent.name: Continent
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/continent.description: The name of the continent in which the Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateP.name: Coordinate Precision
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateP.description: A decimal representation of the precision of the coordinates given in the decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateU.name: Coordinate Uncertainty In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/coordinateU.description: The horizontal distance (in meters) from the given decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude describing the smallest circle containing the whole of the Location. Leave the value empty if the uncertainty is unknown, cannot be estimated, or is not applicable (because there are no coordinates). Zero is not a valid value for this term.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/country.name: Country
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/country.description: The name of the country or major administrative unit in which the Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/countryCode.name: Country Code
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/countryCode.description: The standard code for the country in which the Location occurs.

http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.name: Country Code
http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.description: The ISO code of a country of a location. This element is at the second level of a top-down geographical hierarchy.

http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.name: Country Name
http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.description: The name of a country of a location. This element is at the second level of a top-down geographical hierarchy.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/county.name: County
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/county.description: The full, unabbreviated name of the next smaller administrative region than stateProvince (county, shire, department, etc.) in which the Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLati.name: Decimal Latitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLati.description: The geographic latitude (in decimal degrees, using the spatial reference system given in geodeticDatum) of the geographic center of a Location. Positive values are north of the Equator, negative values are south of it. Legal values lie between -90 and 90, inclusive.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLong.name: Decimal Longitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/decimalLong.description: The geographic longitude (in decimal degrees, using the spatial reference system given in geodeticDatum) of the geographic center of a Location. Positive values are east of the Greenwich Meridian, negative values are west of it. Legal values lie between -180 and 180, inclusive.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintSp.name: Footprint Spatial Fit
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintSp.description: The ratio of the area of the footprint (footprintWKT) to the area of the true (original, or most specific) spatial representation of the Location. Legal values are 0, greater than or equal to 1, or undefined. A value of 1 is an exact match or 100% overlap. A value of 0 should be used if the given footprint does not completely contain the original representation. The footprintSpatialFit is undefined (and should be left empty) if the original representation is a point without uncertainty and the given georeference is not that same point (without uncertainty). If both the original and the given georeference are the same point, the footprintSpatialFit is 1.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintSR.name: Footprint SRS
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintSR.description: A Well-Known Text (WKT) representation of the Spatial Reference System (SRS) for the footprintWKT of the Location. Do not use this term to describe the SRS of the decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude, even if it is the same as for the footprintWKT - use the geodeticDatum instead.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintWK.name: Footprint WKT
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/footprintWK.description: A Well-Known Text (WKT) representation of the shape (footprint, geometry) that defines the Location. A Location may have both a point-radius representation (see decimalLatitude) and a footprint representation, and they may differ from each other.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/geodeticDat.name: Geodetic Datum
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/geodeticDat.description: The ellipsoid, geodetic datum, or spatial reference system (SRS) upon which the geographic coordinates given in decimalLatitude and decimalLongitude as based.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: Georeferenced By
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of names of people, groups, or organizations who determined the georeference (spatial representation) for the Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: Georeference Protocol
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: A description or reference to the methods used to determine the spatial footprint, coordinates, and uncertainties.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: Georeference Remarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: Notes or comments about the spatial description determination, explaining assumptions made in addition or opposition to the those formalized in the method referred to in georeferenceProtocol.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: Georeference Sources
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of maps, gazetteers, or other resources used to georeference the Location, described specifically enough to allow anyone in the future to use the same resources.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.name: Georeference Verification Status
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/georeferenc.description: A categorical description of the extent to which the georeference has been verified to represent the best possible spatial description.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherGeogr.name: Higher Geography
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherGeogr.description: A list (concatenated and separated) of geographic names less specific than the information captured in the locality term.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherGeogr.name: Higher Geography ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/higherGeogr.description: An identifier for the geographic region within which the Location occurred.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/island.name: Island
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/island.description: The name of the island on or near which the Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/islandGroup.name: Island Group
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/islandGroup.description: The name of the island group in which the Location occurs.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locality.name: Locality
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locality.description: The specific description of the place. Less specific geographic information can be provided in other geographic terms (higherGeography, continent, country, stateProvince, county, municipality, waterBody, island, islandGroup). This term may contain information modified from the original to correct perceived errors or standardize the description.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationAcc.name: Location According To
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationAcc.description: Information about the source of this Location information. Could be a publication (gazetteer), institution, or team of individuals.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationID.name: Location ID
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationID.description: An identifier for the set of location information (data associated with dcterms:Location). May be a global unique identifier or an identifier specific to the data set.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationRem.name: Location Remarks
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/locationRem.description: Comments or notes about the Location.

http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.name: Location Shown
http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.description: A location the content of the item is about. For photos that is a location shown in the image.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDept.name: Maximum Depth In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDept.description: The greater depth of a range of depth below the local surface, in meters.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDist.name: Maximum Distance Above Surface In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumDist.description: The greater distance in a range of distance from a reference surface in the vertical direction, in meters. Use positive values for locations above the surface, negative values for locations below. If depth measures are given, the reference surface is the location given by the depth, otherwise the reference surface is the location given by the elevation.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumElev.name: Maximum Elevation In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/maximumElev.description: The upper limit of the range of elevation (altitude, usually above sea level), in meters.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDept.name: Minimum Depth In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDept.description: The lesser depth of a range of depth below the local surface, in meters.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDist.name: Minimum Distance Above Surface In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumDist.description: The lesser distance in a range of distance from a reference surface in the vertical direction, in meters. Use positive values for locations above the surface, negative values for locations below. If depth measures are given, the reference surface is the location given by the depth, otherwise the reference surface is the location given by the elevation.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumElev.name: Minimum Elevation In Meters
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/minimumElev.description: The lower limit of the range of elevation (altitude, usually above sea level), in meters.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/municipalit.name: Municipality
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/municipalit.description: The full, unabbreviated name of the next smaller administrative region than county (city, municipality, etc.) in which the Location occurs. Do not use this term for a nearby named place that does not contain the actual location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/pointRadius.name: Point Radius Spatial Fit
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/pointRadius.description: The ratio of the area of the point-radius (decimalLatitude, decimalLongitude, coordinateUncertaintyInMeters) to the area of the true (original, or most specific) spatial representation of the Location. Legal values are 0, greater than or equal to 1, or undefined. A value of 1 is an exact match or 100% overlap. A value of 0 should be used if the given point-radius does not completely contain the original representation. The pointRadiusSpatialFit is undefined (and should be left empty) if the original representation is a point without uncertainty and the given georeference is not that same point (without uncertainty). If both the original and the given georeference are the same point, the pointRadiusSpatialFit is 1.

http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.name: Province or State
http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.description: The name of a subregion of a country - a province or state - of a location. This element is at the third level of a top-down geographical hierarchy.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/stateProvin.name: State Province
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/stateProvin.description: The name of the next smaller administrative region than country (state, province, canton, department, region, etc.) in which the Location occurs.

http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.name: Sublocation
http://iptc.org/std/Iptc4xmpExt/2008-02-.description: Name of a sublocation. This sublocation name could either be the name of a sublocation to a city or the name of a well known location or (natural) monument outside a city. In the sense of a sublocation to a city this element is at the fifth level of a top-down geographical hierarchy.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.name: Verbatim Coordinates
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.description: The verbatim original spatial coordinates of the Location. The coordinate ellipsoid, geodeticDatum, or full Spatial Reference System (SRS) for these coordinates should be stored in verbatimSRS and the coordinate system should be stored in verbatimCoordinateSystem.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.name: Verbatim Coordinate System
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimCoo.description: The coordinate format for the verbatimLatitude and verbatimLongitude or the verbatimCoordinates of the Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimDep.name: Verbatim Depth
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimDep.description: The original description of the depth below the local surface.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimEle.name: Verbatim Elevation
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimEle.description: The original description of the elevation (altitude, usually above sea level) of the Location.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLat.name: Verbatim Latitude
http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLat.description: The verbatim original latitude of the Location. The coordinate ellipsoid, geodeticDatum, or full Spatial Reference System (SRS) for these coordinates should be stored in verbatimSRS and the coordinate system should be stored in verbatimCoordinateSystem.

http://rs.tdwg.org/dwc/terms/verbatimLoc.name: Verbatim Locality
